mandate: MANDATE: Objective-C/C++ for Mac/iOS integration. TONE: Zero Preamble.

arc_safety: Ensure correct memory management with Automatic Reference Counting
interop_correctness: Ensure correct bridging between C++ and Objective-C.
block_callback_captured: Use `__block` for C++ callbacks captured in Objective-C blocks to
nsstring_conversion: Use `base::SysNSStringToUTF8` or similar to convert between `NSString`
